prompts.name: Rewrite
prompts.template: Rewrite the following text to be clearer and more concise. Output only the rewritten text, no preamble.

prompts.name: Summarize
prompts.template: Summarize the following into 3-5 terse bullets. Output only the bullets.

prompts.name: Explain
prompts.template: Explain the following in simple plain English. Output only the explanation.

prompts.name: Translate
prompts.template: Translate the following into English. Output only the translation.

prompts.name: Fix Grammar
prompts.template: Fix any spelling or grammar mistakes in the following. Output only the corrected text.

prompts.name: Code Review
prompts.template: Review this code and list the top 3 issues. Be terse.

prompts.name: Answer
prompts.template: Answer the question implicit in the following text directly. No preamble.

prompts.name: Pro Tone
prompts.template: Rewrite in a professional tone suitable for business email. Output only the rewritten text.

prompts.name: Key Points
prompts.template: Extract the 5 most important facts from the following. Output as a numbered list.

prompts.name: Questions
prompts.template: Generate 5 sharp questions about the following. Output only the numbered questions.
